name: reply_pattern
description: Demonstrates ``reply_pattern`` for strict reply-format assertions. Asks for a pipe-separated record on a single line and asserts the structure with regexes (anchored, no preamble). Unlike ``contains``, ``reply_pattern`` matches against ``reply_text`` only - CLI noise (debug prints, agent-trace dumps, stderr) cannot produce a false green. ALL patterns must match.

turns.message: Reply with EXACTLY this format on a single line, nothing else: ORDER|42|Ada Lovelace|shipped|1Z999AA10123456784
